name: poc-micro-front
description: POC d'architecture micro-frontends : tous les projets sont en Native Federation. Legacy Angular 16 (host de transition) + shell moderne Angular 21 (host cible) + micro-frontends.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix legacy-shell install && npm --prefix mfe-stats install && npm --prefix mfe-notifications install && npm --prefix shell-modern install
scripts.dev:phase1: concurrently -n legacy,stats,notif -c blue,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix legacy-shell run start" "npm --prefix mfe-stats run start" "npm --prefix mfe-notifications run start"
scripts.dev:phase2: concurrently -n shell,legacy,stats,notif -c cyan,blue,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix shell-modern run start" "npm --prefix legacy-shell run start" "npm --prefix mfe-stats run start" "npm --prefix mfe-notifications run start"
